targets.query: SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "reg_generation" WHERE (("technology" = 'Hydro Run-of-river and poundage' OR "technology" = 'Hydro Water Reservoir')AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode" =~ /^$mode$/ AND "balanced" =~ /^$balanced$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC
SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE ("technology" = 'Biomass' AND "country" =~ /^$state$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE (("technology" = 'Fossil Gas' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Coal-derived gas') AND "country" =~ /^$state$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE (("technology" = 'Fossil Gas' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Coal-derived gas') AND "country" =~ /^$state$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "reg_generation" WHERE (("technology" = 'Fossil Coal-derived gas' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Oil shale' OR "technology" = 'Waste' OR "technology" = 'Other' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Peat') AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode" =~ /^$mode$/ AND "balanced" =~ /^$balanced$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Total capacity")  / 4 FROM "Capacities" WHERE ("simulationID" =~ /^$Scenario$/ AND "technology" = 'Renewable' AND "UnitName" = 'Solar [MW]') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "technology", "UnitName" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "reg_generation" WHERE (("technology" = 'Other renewable' OR "technology" = 'Geothermal' OR "technology" = 'Marine') AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode" =~ /^$mode$/ AND "balanced" =~ /^$balanced$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Reg_generation" WHERE ("technology" = 'Hydro Pumped Storage' AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode"  =~ /^$mode$/AND "Generation [MW]" <= 0 AND "balanced" =~ /^$balanced$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Reg_generation" WHERE ("technology" = 'Hydro Pumped Storage' AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode"  =~ /^$mode$/AND "Generation [MW]" > 0 AND "balanced" =~ /^$balanced$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "state" WHERE "state" != 'Common' AND "state" != 'NW'
list.name: state
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "state" WHERE "state" != 'Common' AND "state" != 'NW'
